headline: PPL Leans Into Data Center Demand With US$23b Grid Buildout
summary: PPL Corporation (NYSE:PPL) plans to invest $23b in generation, transmission, and distribution projects. The program targets rising data center power demand, with a focus on Pennsylvania and Kentucky. The initiative reflects how utilities are responding to growing electricity needs from the digital economy. PPL trades at $35.44, with the stock up 5.6% over the past year and 46.3% over the past five years. The company is laying out a large capital plan that is directly tied to data center...
